//: Test-only asc config: builds ONLY the off-target account-context decoder shim (test/account-context-shim.ts), never the sample. Passed explicitly via --config (see test/account-context.test.mjs) so the root asconfig.json — whose entry is assembly/sample.ts — is not auto-discovered and the two modules are not merged. Like the decoder-shim config it does NOT override abort: the shim is a test harness run in Node (not loaded by the frozen-ABI host gate), so an env.abort import is harmless and the test provides a stub for it. The decoders are total and --noAssert strips assertions, so abort is never actually reached.
